subcodes.first_line: O beloved one! Thy letter dated 13 November 1909 was received... And as to thy question concerning the passage in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز نامه مورخ ۱۳ نومبر ۱۹۰۹ وصول یافت ... و اما سوال از عبارتی که در کتاب خطاب
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @unity; oneness of humanity
